summary: The enquiry is about a UK SaaS startup seeking assistance in reviewing and updating investment documents and customer contracts in preparation for a Series A funding round, with an emphasis on data protection for EU customers. The client has a tight timeline and wants to initiate discussions this week.

A UK SaaS startup is seeking assistance with reviewing and updating investment documents and customer contracts in preparation for their Series A round, as well as ensuring compliance with data protection regulations for their EU customers.

A UK SaaS startup is seeking assistance with reviewing and updating investment documents and customer contracts in preparation for their Series A round, while also ensuring compliance with data protection regulations. They have a tight timeline and wish to speak to someone this week.
